productDisplayName: Chhota Bheem Kids Boys I Like to Paint Navy Blue T-shirt
description: Composition Navy blue and white top made of 100% cotton, has mock layered sleeves with a short navy sleeve with two white stripes and a long white sleeve, v-neck with white binding and graphic print on the front Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm Tumble dry low Do not dry clean Warm iron on reverse; do not iron on print It's all fun and games in this long sleeved top from Green Gold's chhota bheem collection. The cute picture of the Chhota Bheem characters make this the perfect tee for any child who likes to paint. Crafted from pure cotton, this top offers exemplary comfort. Team it with denim trousers or shorts.
